_note: Locked. Only updated when Gaurav approves a strategy change.
what_we_never_say: Never pitch the hiring/consulting angle in public content. Never use jargon-heavy AI buzzwords without explaining them. Never sound like a generic 'AI guru'.
tone_specifics: Straight-talking but makes complex AI simple to understand. Founder-to-founder energy. No fluff. Teach through examples, not theory.
